message:
Command `# TWO Python environments!
# The binary launches from: /nix/store/2d2zv269d8dxh38b3l5jvq929fl7dkni-python3.11-librelane-2.4.6
# But uses PYTHONPATH from: /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env
# The open_pdks_rev from the RUNNING environment:
cat /nix/store/2d2zv269d8dxh38b3l5jvq929fl7dkni-python3.11-librelane-2.4.6/bin/librelane | grep -o "python3.11-librelane-[^ ]*" | head -2
cat $(find /nix/store/2d2zv269d8dxh38b3l5jvq929fl7dkni-python3.11-librelane-2.4.6 -name "open_pdks_rev" 2>/dev/null | head -1)` executed with exit code 0.
